name: Cranberry Surprise Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan with melted butter or margarine. Line the bottom and sides with wax paper and grease again. Set aside.
2. In a blender or food processor, combine cream cheese and 1 egg until smooth and creamy. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Whisk in apple juice, melted margarine, and 1 egg into the dry ingredients.
5. Stir in cranberries and chopped nuts.
6. Spoon half of the batter into the prepared pan. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the batter.
7. Top with remaining batter, spreading carefully.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 70-75 minutes. Cool for 15 minutes before unmolding.
9. Remove wax paper and let cool completely. Wrap well and refrigerate. Bring out of the refrigerator 1 hour before serving.
